description_long: This object is a vintage-style telephone booth, featuring a tall, rectangular body with a deep reddish-brown metallic finish. The front face has a large, frosted glass or plastic panel, likely for signage or instructions, and a smaller illuminated panel above it. At the top, there is a prominent octagonal sign, which is white on the front and dark on the back, possibly for branding or identification. The sides are plain, with a subtle metallic sheen, and the back is solid with no visible openings or windows. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, reminiscent of early 20th-century public amenities found on city streets.
description: A tall, vintage-style reddish-brown telephone booth with a frosted front panel and an octagonal sign on top, featuring a solid, metallic construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large frosted panel, illuminated top section, and the white octagonal sign.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the booth's narrow profile and the edge of the octagonal sign, with no visible windows or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid metallic back and the dark reverse side of the octagonal sign.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the booth's slim side and the sign's edge.
attribute_window_configuration: one large frosted panel on the front, no visible windows on other sides
attribute_signage_or_labeling: octagonal white sign on top, no visible text
